reviews.comment:
Cafe muy muy feo quemado e hirviendo, no lo pudimos tomar de lo feo que estaba. Sólo la recomiendo para cargar nafta y si tenes niños hay unos juegos lindos para descansar.

(Translated by Google)
The coffee was awful, burnt and boiling hot; we couldn't even drink it because it was so bad. I only recommend it for getting gas, and if you have kids, there's a nice playground where you can relax.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMzeWZMR1JREAE

reviews.comment:
siempre es lindo hacer una parada en la YPF del ACA de Rio Tala

(Translated by Google)
It's always nice to stop at the YPF gas station at the ACA in Rio Tala.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMzam9LcHRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un clásico de años !! Siempre la misma calidad!! No falla!! Sin dudas es una parada obligada!!

(Translated by Google)
A classic for years! Always the same quality! Never disappoints! Definitely a must-visit!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMzeXRlMFlnEAE

reviews.comment:
Amplio, limpio, apacible. Muy lindo para una parada y recargar pilas para seguir viaje

(Translated by Google)
Spacious, clean, and peaceful. Perfect for a stop to recharge before continuing your journey.

reviews.comment:
Aunque ahora ofrecen promos que convienen, es muy caro en general y cierran por la noche.

(Translated by Google)
Although they now offer some good deals, it's generally very expensive and they close at night.

Very good, like practically all ACA stations.

reviews.comment:
Eramos 5 personas , solo comimos 3, la comida de dos (empanadas y tarta de verdura ) dejo mucho que desear , la hamburguesa estaba buena, pero no es económico,  y además no pertenecen a YPF Full y no se puede pagar con la app de ypf

(Translated by Google)
There were 5 of us, but only 3 of us ate. The meal for two (empanadas and vegetable tart) left much to be desired. The hamburger was good, but it's not cheap, and they're not part of the YPF Full network, so you can't pay with the YPF app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuNzgzeWJREAE

reviews.comment:
En caída! Era "el lugar" y dejó de serlo, cambió para peor

(Translated by Google)
In decline! It used to be "the place" and it's not anymore, it's changed for the worse
